00004 #include <gsl/gsl_vector.h>
00005 #include "Vector3.h"

00007 
00008 #define SQR(X) ((X)*(X)) 
00009 
00011 
00012 inline Vector3 gsl_to_vector3( gsl_vector *v )
00013 {
00014  return Vector3( gsl_vector_get( v, 0 ),
00015                  gsl_vector_get( v, 1 ),
00016                  gsl_vector_get( v, 2 ) );
00017 }
00018
